  • Overview
  • Tree

  • Help

    All Classes and Interfaces

    Class
    Description
    AbstractGun
    Base implementation for guns that fire projectile bullets.
    Bullet
    Represents the bullet.
    Collidable
    Defines an object that can provide a collision boundary.
    ExplosiveBarrel
    Represents the explosive barrel.
    GameEffect
     
    GameEntity
    Base type for all in-game entities that have position, size, and active state.
    GameImageLoader
     
    GameMain
    Represents the game main.
    GameMap
    Represents the game map.
    GamePanel
    Represents the game panel.
    GameSettings
    Represents the game settings.
    Gun
    Describes a weapon that a player can equip and fire.
    GunRegistry
    Represents the gun registry.
    Landmine
    Represents the landmine.
    MachineGun
    Represents the machine gun.
    MapSelectPanel
    Represents the map select panel.
    MatchDropCoordinator
     
    MatchTimerService
    Represents the match timer service.
    MenuPanel
    Represents the menu panel.
    PauseOverlay
     
    PistolGun
    Represents the pistol gun.
    PlatformSurface
    Represents the platform surface.
    Player
    Represents the player.
    Player.GunPose
    Immutable gun rendering pose used while drawing and spawning bullets.
    Player.JumpResult
    Represents the jump result.
    Player.TrailSample
    Immutable snapshot for speed trail rendering.
    PowerUp
    Base type for collectible power-ups that apply temporary player effects.
    Renderable
    Defines an object that can draw itself on a JavaFX canvas.
    RifleGun
    Represents the rifle gun.
    SharedMultiplayerCamera
    Represents the shared multiplayer camera.
    SharedMultiplayerCamera.CameraTarget
    Immutable target state computed from tracked bounds.
    ShieldPowerUp
    Represents the shield power up.
    ShotgunGun
    Represents the shotgun gun.
    SoundManager
    Represents the sound manager.
    SoundManager.BgmMode
    Private helper type for bgm mode.
    SpeedPowerUp
    Represents the speed power up.
    SpriteFrame
    Represents the sprite frame.
    Trap
    Base type for map traps that can be triggered and apply explosion force.
    UnarmedGun
    Represents the unarmed gun.
    Updatable
    Defines an object that updates its state every frame.
    WeaponDrop
     
    WeaponSelectPanel
    Represents the weapon select panel.
